title: Weber Enamel Cleaner 300ml, fine Mist Spray for streak-free Cleaning of Enamel Surfaces, dissolves Food and Grease Residues (17684)
features: SPOTLESS CLEAN – Barbecues are no easy game, so clean up grease, dirt and food residue easily with the Weber Enamel Cleaner Spray, designed to thoroughly clean the enamel components of your BBQ grill
PREVENTATIVE – The Enamel Cleaner Spray protects your barbecue by dissolving residue and resolving long-term build-up which could damage your grill, and makes it shine like brand new too!
EASY-TO-SPRAY – The BBQ Cleaning Spray is easy-to-use and sprays a fine mist - simply spray the inside and outside of your cold BBQ grill, wait 30 seconds and wipe clean to save yourself time
FRESH BBQ – With regular use, the BBQ Cleaner Spray will keep your barbecue looking fresh in the garden in any weather, all-year-round, and makes sure it's ready for the next party, at all times
WEBER QUALITY SPRAYS - You’ve invested in a Weber BBQ Grill and got the Weber BBQ accessories, now maintain your prize possession with Weber Cleaning Sprays, designed with your grill in mind
